app.name: Adolescent Physical Fitness
app.tagline: Physical fitness assessment in Secondary Education

landing.heroTitle: Measure, assess and improve your students' physical fitness
landing.heroSubtitle: Educational platform for Physical Education teachers in Secondary School. Eurofit and CFS batteries with official scales, Omni-Res perceived exertion, PDF reports and comparative analytics.
landing.feature1Desc: Eurofit and CFS with 6 tests each. Scores computed automatically by age and sex.
landing.feature2Desc: Two-step verification by email code — no extra apps, accessible to every teacher.
landing.feature3Desc: Each student can check their own results with a personal code — no account needed.
landing.feature4Desc: Compare your school and group with aggregated results from the whole community.

auth.title: Teacher login
auth.otpDesc: We sent a 6-digit code to your email. Enter it to complete sign in.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then sign in.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.

consent.privacyLabel: I have read and accept the
consent.implantacionLabel: I request that my school be onboarded into APF.
consent.implantacionHelp: This is just a formality so that aggregated data (never individual or identifiable) can become part of community statistics. All personal information stays hidden.
consent.errorPrivacy: You must accept the privacy policy.
consent.errorImplantacion: You must submit your school's onboarding request.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.subtitle: Information on how APF processes your data.

implantacion.title: School onboarding request
implantacion.desc: We need a few basic details to onboard your school. Students' personal information is always hidden in public statistics.
implantacion.messagePh: Tell us briefly how many groups you have, which year, etc.
implantacion.note: By submitting this request you agree that your school's aggregated data may appear in public statistics, anonymously or by name depending on your choice.
implantacion.successDesc: We have received your request. You can now continue with sign-up.

publico.noResults: No results for the selected filters.

studentLogin.title: Student access
studentLogin.subtitle: Enter your personal code to see your results
studentLogin.notFound: No student found with that code.

centros.title: Schools
centros.subtitle: Pick an existing school or register a new one
centros.name: School name
centros.anonimoHelp: When enabled, your school appears in public stats only with an opaque code (e.g. CFA-A1B2C). The real name remains visible only to you.
centros.mostrarPublicoHelp: Allow your school's aggregated data (always anonymised at student level) to contribute to community comparisons.

grupos.title: Class groups
grupos.noGrupos: No groups yet. Create your first one to start.

manual.title: Application user manual
manual.subtitle: Quick guide to get the most out of APF in your PE classes.
manual.footnote: For further questions, contact the administrator or check the full documentation in the admin panel.

sections.title: Getting started
items: Create your teacher account with your email and verify the two-factor code you receive by email.
Accept the privacy policy and register (or select) your school.
Choose whether your school appears with its real name or with an anonymous code in public statistics.

sections.title: Create groups and students
items: From 'Groups', add your classes (year, letter and academic year).
Inside each group, add your students: first name, surnames, date of birth, sex and classroom number.
Every student automatically receives a personal code to check their results without needing an account.

sections.title: Record the tests
items: Choose the battery: Eurofit (6 tests) or CFS (6 tests).
Enter the value of each test; scores are computed automatically by age and sex using the official scales.
Record the Omni-Res perceived exertion (0-10) after each test to truly track the workload.

sections.title: Reports and statistics
items: Generate individual PDF reports per student with all their tests, scores and progress charts.
Open the group dashboard to see averages, dispersion and comparison against the whole community.
Students can sign in with their personal code from 'Student access' to privately view their results.

sections.title: Best practices
items: Run a standardised warm-up before any battery.
Keep the same conditions (space, equipment, time of day) between rounds so the comparison is reliable.
Share with students the formative purpose of the tests: it is not about competing, but about improving.
